title: Neoprene Wristlet Makeup Bag | Portable Cosmetic Pouch with Wrist Strap
seoTitle: Neoprene Wristlet Makeup Bag | Custom Cosmetic Pouch Manufacturer
description:
The Neoprene Wristlet Makeup Bag is designed for people who want convenience without sacrificing style. Featuring a practical wrist strap and a sleek minimalist silhouette, this cosmetic pouch is easy to carry on its own or place inside a tote, backpack, or suitcase.

Made from premium soft neoprene, the bag offers a lightweight yet protective structure that helps organize makeup, skincare products, toiletries, and daily essentials. The wide-bottom construction expands storage capacity while maintaining a compact appearance, making it ideal for commuting, travel, shopping, or weekend outings.

Its water-resistant surface protects against everyday splashes, while the smooth zipper keeps contents secure and easily accessible. The contrasting zipper and wrist strap add a modern visual touch, creating a fashionable accessory suitable for beauty brands and lifestyle collections.

Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides comprehensive OEM and ODM manufacturing services, including custom sizes, logo applications, Pantone color matching, lining materials, zipper accessories, and premium retail packaging for global customers.
seoDescription: Premium neoprene wristlet makeup bags manufactured by Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. Lightweight, water-resistant cosmetic pouches with wrist straps, custom logo printing, OEM & ODM manufacturing, and wholesale supply.
